report.summary: Researched stablecoin payment trends + GENIUS Act, wrote a 3,200-word learn guide, added Article + FAQ structured data, and added the page to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: GENIUS Act signed July 18, 2025 — first US federal stablecoin law, requires 100% reserves and monthly attestations
Stablecoin market cap grew from $205B to ~$310B in 2025, projected to surpass $1T by late 2026
USDC processed ~$18.3T and USDT ~$13.3T in 2025; together = 93% of market
On-chain stablecoin tx volume hit $8.9T in H1 2025 alone; ~$390B in pure payment volume in 2025
Visa stablecoin settlement: $4.5B annualized run rate Jan 2026; remittances $19B annualized
No existing degen0x payments-specific guide — stablecoin-comparison covers types, payfi-guide covers DeFi yield, gap identified

sections.title: Content Created
items: 3,200-word learn guide: Stablecoin Payments Guide 2026: GENIUS Act, Cross-Border Transfers & On-Chain Finance

9 sections covering: types refresher, payment rails comparison, GENIUS Act deep-dive, major stablecoins (USDT/USDC/PYUSD/EURC), cross-border step-by-step, 6 use cases, institutional adoption (Visa/PayPal/JPMorgan/Stripe), risks (6 rated), FAQ (6 questions)
Comparison table: Traditional Wire vs USDC on Solana vs USDT on Tron
Real example: $50K invoice US→Brazil — $825 fees/3-4 days wire vs ~$25-50/<1 min stablecoin
3 internal links: /learn/stablecoin-comparison, /learn/payfi-guide, /tools/dca-calculator

report.summary: Researched, wrote, SEO-optimized, and scaffolded a comprehensive Pendle Finance / Yield Tokenization guide (16 min read) with an interactive PT Fixed Yield Calculator component, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic selected: Pendle Finance — yield tokenization protocol not yet covered on degen0x
Market position: ~$8.9B TVL, 58% on-chain yield trading market share (March 2026)
Key mechanism: SY wrapper splits yield-bearing assets into PT (fixed yield) + YT (yield speculation)
New product: Boros (V3) tokenizes perp funding rates — $5.5B early notional volume
January 2026 tokenomics overhaul: vePENDLE replaced by liquid sPENDLE (14-day unstaking)
Chains supported: Ethereum, Arbitrum, BSC, Base, Mantle
Annual revenue >$40M with 80% going to token buybacks
Key competing angle: no existing degen0x content on yield tokenization as a category

sections.title: Content Created
items: 16 min read comprehensive learn guide — 10 structured sections with ToC

Covers: What is Pendle, yield tokenization mechanics, PT vs YT comparison table, Pendle AMM, three core strategies, Boros V3, sPENDLE tokenomics, risk matrix, getting-started walkthrough, 6-question FAQ
Info boxes, comparison tables, and step-by-step flows throughout
5 internal links: /learn/liquid-staking-derivatives, /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, /tools/staking-apy, /tools/yield-farming-calculator, /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026
Disclaimer and risk section covering 5 distinct risk categories

sections.title: Research Brief

report.summary: Built two timely guides — Crypto Tax Guide 2026 (Form 1099-DA era, 14 min read) and Ethereum Pectra Upgrade Guide (April 2026 mainnet, 13 min read) — each with an interactive calculator component, full SEO metadata, structured data, and PUBLISH_QUEUE integration.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Crypto Tax Guide 2026 — Extremely timely (April 15 deadline 31 days away), new Form 1099-DA mandatory for 2025 transactions filed in 2026, wallet-by-wallet cost basis rules now in effect, no existing degen0x comprehensive tax guide

Topic 2: Ethereum Pectra Upgrade — Mainnet targeting April 2026, final testnet milestone reached March 2026, most EIPs in any single Ethereum upgrade (11), EIP-7702 native account abstraction is industry-defining UX change
Tax data sourced from IRS.gov, Koinly, TokenTax, MetaMask News, CoinTracking (March 2026)
Pectra data sourced from Ethereum Foundation blog, ConsenSys, Coinbase, QuickNode, Alchemy, blocklr.com (March 2026)
Cross-referenced existing degen0x content — confirmed no overlap with /taxes/learn/tax-loss-harvesting (existing) or /learn/account-abstraction (existing)

report.summary: Researched and built two new learn guides — Sonic Blockchain (formerly Fantom L1) and Ethena USDe (synthetic dollar / Internet Bond) — with full SEO metadata, structured data, internal links, an interactive sUSDe Yield Calculator, and both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Sonic (formerly Fantom): launched Jan 2025, SonicVM (400K TPS theoretical), SonicDB, 720ms finality, <$0.0001 tx cost, FeeM dev revenue-share model up to 90%, TVL peaked $1.54B corrected to ~$367M, S token ~$0.042 (ATH $1.03), 3.23B circulating / 3.89B total, 50% fee burn, no new inflation for 4 years (funded from Fantom Opera reserves), community approved 99.9%

Ethena USDe: delta-hedged synthetic dollar on Ethereum, stETH + short perpetual collateral, sUSDe 'Internet Bond' yield-bearing token (non-rebasing), TVL peaked $14.98B Oct 2025 now ~$6.7B, USDe reached #3 stablecoin at $14B peak market cap, $79M revenue last 90 days (4th largest stablecoin issuer), ENA 15B total / 7.42B circulating (49.5%), 2026 roadmap: Converge Network (w/ Securitize) + fee switch activation
Sources: DefiLlama, CoinGecko, The Defiant, CoinTelegraph, Coin Metrics, The Block, BanklessTimes — March 2026
Both topics unambiguously absent from existing degen0x learn/ coverage, PUBLISH_QUEUE was empty

report.summary: Researched GENIUS Act stablecoin regulation and meme coin launchpad landscape, wrote two comprehensive learn guides (~2,800 and ~2,500 words), applied full SEO metadata + Article/FAQ structured data, built an interactive filterable launchpad comparison component (MemeLaunchpadComparison), and added both pages to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: GENIUS Act signed July 17, 2025 — first comprehensive US federal stablecoin law; requires 1:1 reserves (cash/short-term Treasuries), monthly disclosures, permitted issuer status for US persons
USDC (Circle) confirmed GENIUS Act compliant; USDT (Tether/BVI entity) outside US framework — Tether launched USA₮ as compliant US variant
DeFi protocols explicitly exempt — immutable smart contracts, liquidity pools, self-custodial wallets carved out from issuer requirements
Treasury targeting final rules July 2026; full compliance deadline early 2027
Pump.fun market share fell from 98% to ~57% by mid-2025 as competitors emerged
Pump.fun crossed $1B lifetime revenue; 11.9M+ tokens launched; $101.8M daily launchpad volume (March 2026)
Major competitor landscape: LetsBonk + Moonshot (Solana), Clanker + Zora + Flaunch (Base), four.meme (BNB), SunPump (Tron), Blum (TON), Moonbags (Sui)
CoinGecko named Meme Launchpads 2.0 a top crypto narrative for 2026; Pump.fun launched PUMP governance/utility token July 2025

report.summary: Researched the CLARITY Act crypto market structure bill and the 2026 privacy coin narrative; wrote two comprehensive learn guides (~3,200 and ~2,900 words); applied full SEO metadata, Article + FAQ structured data, and 5-6 internal links each; scaffolded both pages and added them to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: CLARITY Act (H.R.3633, 119th Congress): passed House mid-2025, stalled in Senate March 2026 — defines commodity vs security classification for all digital assets, splits CFTC (exclusive jurisdiction over digital commodity spot markets) vs SEC (investment contract assets), creates decentralization pathway for tokens to graduate from SEC oversight once no single entity controls >20% supply

March 1 Trump deadline to resolve stablecoin yield disagreements passed without deal; Treasury Secretary Bessent targets spring 2026 Senate passage — extremely high search intent, no existing degen0x coverage
Zero existing degen0x pages on CLARITY Act — confirmed natural companion piece to genius-act-stablecoin-guide
Privacy coin sector returned 288% in 2025 vs broader altcoin market staying flat; total privacy market cap surpassed $24B
Monero (XMR) hit all-time high ~$790 in early 2026 after years of underperformance; Zcash (ZEC) gained 1,000%+ from cycle lows before cooling to $400-$450 range
Zcash crisis: entire Electric Coin Company dev team resigned January 7, 2026 citing constructive discharge — significant roadmap uncertainty
Dubai banned privacy tokens January 12, 2026; EU MiCA travel rule making exchange listings difficult — regulatory pressure paradoxically driving demand on DEX/P2P platforms
No existing degen0x privacy coin content beyond zksync-era-guide (L2) and zero-knowledge-proofs (tech concept)

sections.title: Content Created
items: CLARITY Act Crypto Guide (~3,200 words, 14 min read) — 8 sections: what is the CLARITY Act, commodity vs security classification cards, SEC vs CFTC jurisdiction table, decentralization pathway mechanics, exchange impact, DeFi protocol impact, 5-milestone legislative timeline, investor implications (4 scenario cards), 6-question FAQ

Privacy Coins Guide 2026 (~2,900 words, 13 min read) — 8 sections: what privacy coins are + 2025 performance, why public blockchain privacy matters, Monero deep dive (ring signatures/stealth addresses/RingCT + XMR metrics table), Zcash deep dive (zk-SNARKs + ECC crisis + ZEC metrics table), other protocols (Secret Network/Oasis/Tornado Cash/Dash), regulatory landscape table by jurisdiction, 5 risk categories with severity boxes, 5-question FAQ

report.summary: Researched Bitcoin strategic reserves (US 325K BTC, global sovereign accumulation) and tokenized treasuries ($25.5B on-chain, BlackRock BUIDL + Ondo), wrote two comprehensive learn guides (~2,600 and ~2,900 words), applied full SEO metadata + Article/FAQ structured data, built an interactive SovereignBTCTracker component, and added both pages to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Bitcoin Strategic Reserve: US formally established Strategic Bitcoin Reserve March 2026, holds ~325,000-328,000 BTC (~1.6% of supply) from law enforcement seizures — largest sovereign holder. El Salvador 7,508 BTC since 2021. Bhutan ~13,000 BTC via state hydro mining since 2019. Brazil proposed RESBit bill to accumulate up to 1M BTC over 5 years. Pakistan announced reserve framework 2026. Total confirmed government BTC >460,000 (~2.3% of supply).

Tokenized Treasuries: On-chain RWA market at $25.5B (up from $1.2B Jan 2023), 37% YoY growth. Tokenized treasuries ~$9B. BlackRock BUIDL at $2.3B AUM (Ethereum, via Securitize, $5M min). Ondo Finance OUSG $750M+ and USDY $500M+ (Ethereum/Solana/Sui, from $500). Franklin Templeton Benji $400M+ ($20 min). Fed funds rate 4.25-4.5% driving ~4.4-4.9% APY on products. DeFi integration via Morpho/Euler collateral, USDY/USDC Uniswap pools. 2026 projection: $100B+ by EOY.
Cross-referenced all 78 existing learn pages — confirmed zero overlap on both topics.

report.summary: Researched MegaETH (real-time L2, 100K TPS, launched Feb 2026) and Abstract Chain (consumer crypto ZK rollup by Pudgy Penguins), wrote full learn guides for both, and queued both pages for publishing.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: MegaETH launched mainnet Feb 9, 2026 — 100,000 TPS, 10ms blocks, Streaming EVM. Backed by Paradigm + Vitalik Buterin. TVL ~6M at launch. MEGA token locked pending performance milestones.

Abstract Chain launched mainnet Jan 27, 2025 — ZK rollup by Igloo Inc. (Pudgy Penguins). Native ERC-4337 account abstraction, Abstract Global Wallet. 100+ apps at launch, 94K testnet users, 650K X followers.
L2 landscape: Base dominates ~B TVL; MegaETH 0.14% of 1B total L2 TVL; most 2024-2025 L2s became ghost chains post-incentives.
MEGA token unlock requires one of: 00M MegaUSD market cap, 10 apps with 100K txns across 25K wallets, or 3 dApps at 0K daily fees for 1 month — none met as of March 2026.
Abstract liveness failure (May 2025, batch 16529) resolved by emergency verifier override — key centralization risk in early-stage rollups.

sections.title: Content Created
items: MegaETH guide (~2,700 words): Streaming EVM architecture, node separation, mainnet stats, MEGA tokenomics with unlock conditions, ecosystem use cases, competitive comparison table, 5-risk assessment, onboarding guide.

Abstract Chain guide (~2,500 words): Pudgy Penguins origin, ZK rollup + ERC-4337 architecture, AGW feature comparison table, consumer crypto thesis, L2 competitive positioning, 5-risk assessment, onboarding guide.
Both guides: SEO metadata, OG images, ArticleSchema + FAQSchema structured data, internal links to tools and cross-links between the two new guides.

report.summary: Researched Babylon Protocol (Bitcoin-native staking, $1.9B TVL), wrote a 3,200-word learn guide with 8 sections, built a BabylonYieldEstimator interactive component, applied full SEO + 3-schema structured data, and added the page to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Babylon Protocol has ~$1.9B TVL with 57,000+ BTC staked from 140K+ unique wallets as of March 2026
Babylon Genesis (first Bitcoin Secured Network) launched April 2025 — Cosmos SDK chain routing BTC security to PoS downstream networks
BABY token market cap ~$43M vs $1.9B TVL — low ratio indicates either deep value or market skepticism about BSN adoption timeline
Key differentiator vs EigenLayer: slashing enforced on-chain on Bitcoin via EOTS (Extractable One-Time Signatures), no Ethereum involvement needed
LST providers: Lombard (~$2B TVL peak, LBTC), Solv Protocol (~$1.96B, SolvBTC), Kraken (pays BABY yields ~1% APY)
Backing: Paradigm, Polychain Capital, Bullish, Hack VC
Staking APY range: 0.5–1% in BABY tokens — yield value is highly dependent on BABY token price
No existing degen0x content on Bitcoin-native staking — clear gap, strong search intent for 'bitcoin staking 2026', 'babylon protocol guide', 'btcfi yield'

sections.title: Content Created
items: ~3,200-word learn guide: 'Babylon Protocol: The Complete Bitcoin Staking Guide (2026)'

8 sections: What is Babylon (with stats grid), EOTS mechanics (5-step numbered flow), BTC yield comparison table (5 methods), Step-by-step staking guide (direct + LST routes), BABY tokenomics table, Risk matrix (5 categories with severity ratings), BSN ecosystem explanation, FAQ (6 questions)
Yield comparison table: Babylon vs centralized lending vs WBTC/Aave vs Lombard LST vs Lightning routing
5-step HowTo for direct staking via staking.babylonlabs.io
LST provider cards: Lombard, Solv Protocol, Kraken

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title: 'Babylon Protocol: Bitcoin Staking Guide 2026 | degen0x' (57 chars — primary keyword first)
Meta description: 156 chars targeting 'bitcoin staking', 'babylon protocol', 'btcfi', 'trustless bitcoin staking'
OpenGraph: article type, publishedTime + modifiedTime 2026-03-15T00:00:00Z, OG image path set
Twitter: summary_large_image card configured
Structured data: Article schema (3200 words) + HowTo schema (5 steps) + FAQ schema (6 questions) — combined via combineSchemas(), rendered via StructuredData component
Keywords: babylon protocol, bitcoin staking, btc staking, baby token, btcfi, bitcoin yield, bitcoin secured network, trustless bitcoin staking, bitcoin staking 2026
Internal links: /learn/restaking-eigenlayer, /learn/bitcoin-layer-2-guide, /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, /tools/defi-yields
Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts

sections.title: Interactive Component
items: BabylonYieldEstimator.tsx — client component, zero external dependencies
Inputs: BTC amount (with 0.005 BTC minimum validation), lock period selector (3/6/12/24 months), BTC price (USD), BABY price (USD) — all user-adjustable
Outputs: 3 yield scenarios — Conservative 0.5% APY / Base Case 0.85% APY / Optimistic 1.2% APY — each showing BABY token rewards, USD value, and annual rate
Embedded after BABY tokenomics section for contextual relevance
Includes disclaimer: estimates are approximate, not financial advice
TypeScript: 0 errors in new files (pre-existing errors in AICourseRecommendations.tsx and structured-data.examples.ts are unrelated)
